title: Chandigarh University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Chandigarh University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!
